---
title: "Git Notes again"
format: html
---

## Basics of using git

Git is a distributed version control system (VCS) that is very popular. 

The core steps to using git involve:

1. Initiate a git repository
    In RStudio, we just click a little radio button on project creation
    At the command line, we type: `git init`
    
2. Do your normal work 
    Add files
    Modify files, etc.
    
3. Add important files to the "staged" 
    In RStudio, we click the "staged" radio button
    At the command line, we type: `git add filename`

4. Commit your staged files to the repository 
    In RStudio, you just hit the "Commit" bitton and add a msg
    At the command line, we type: `git commit -m "your msg"`
    
    

You can check your project "history" and status
    At the command line, you can type: `git status` or 
      `git log` (push q to exit)
